initial_candidates.sql:
WITH monthly_deliveries AS (
  SELECT 
    strftime('%Y', order_delivered_customer_date) AS year,
    strftime('%m', order_delivered_customer_date) AS month,
    COUNT(*) AS delivered_count
  FROM olist_orders
  WHERE order_status = 'delivered' 
    AND order_delivered_customer_date IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY year, month
)
SELECT 
  month AS month,
  MAX(CASE WHEN year = '2016' THEN delivered_count ELSE 0 END) AS "2016",
  MAX(CASE WHEN year = '2017' THEN delivered_count ELSE 0 END) AS "2017",
  MAX(CASE WHEN year = '2018' THEN delivered_count ELSE 0 END) AS "2018"
FROM monthly_deliveries
GROUP BY month
ORDER BY month ASC;

SELECT 
  strftime('%m', order_delivered_customer_date) AS month,
  SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', order_delivered_customer_date) = '2016' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS year_2016,
  SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', order_delivered_customer_date) = '2017' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS year_2017,
  SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', order_delivered_customer_date) = '2018' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS year_2018
FROM olist_orders
WHERE order_status = 'delivered'
  AND order_delivered_customer_date IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY strftime('%m', order_delivered_customer_date)
ORDER BY strftime('%m', order_delivered_customer_date) ASC;

WITH monthly_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    strftime('%Y', order_delivered_customer_date) AS year,
    strftime('%m', order_delivered_customer_date) AS month,
    COUNT(*) AS delivered_count
  FROM olist_orders
  WHERE order_status = 'delivered'
    AND order_delivered_customer_date IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY year, month
)
SELECT 
  month AS month,
  MAX(CASE WHEN year = '2016' THEN delivered_count ELSE 0 END) AS "2016",
  MAX(CASE WHEN year = '2017' THEN delivered_count ELSE 0 END) AS "2017",
  MAX(CASE WHEN year = '2018' THEN delivered_count ELSE 0 END) AS "2018"
FROM monthly_counts
GROUP BY month
ORDER BY month ASC;

WITH monthly_deliveries AS (
    SELECT 
        strftime('%Y', order_delivered_customer_date) AS year,
        strftime('%m', order_delivered_customer_date) AS month,
        COUNT(*) AS delivered_count
    FROM olist_orders
    WHERE order_status = 'delivered'
      AND order_delivered_customer_date IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY year, month
)
SELECT 
    month AS month_number,
    MAX(CASE WHEN year = '2016' THEN delivered_count ELSE 0 END) AS "2016",
    MAX(CASE WHEN year = '2017' THEN delivered_count ELSE 0 END) AS "2017",
    MAX(CASE WHEN year = '2018' THEN delivered_count ELSE 0 END) AS "2018"
FROM monthly_deliveries
GROUP BY month
ORDER BY month ASC;

WITH monthly_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    strftime('%Y', order_delivered_customer_date) AS year,
    strftime('%m', order_delivered_customer_date) AS month,
    COUNT(*) AS delivered_count
  FROM olist_orders
  WHERE order_status = 'delivered'
    AND order_delivered_customer_date IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY year, month
)
SELECT 
  month,
  MAX(CASE WHEN year = '2016' THEN delivered_count ELSE 0 END) AS "2016",
  MAX(CASE WHEN year = '2017' THEN delivered_count ELSE 0 END) AS "2017",
  MAX(CASE WHEN year = '2018' THEN delivered_count ELSE 0 END) AS "2018"
FROM monthly_counts
GROUP BY month
ORDER BY month ASC;

aggregation.selected_sql:
WITH monthly_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    strftime('%Y', order_delivered_customer_date) AS year,
    strftime('%m', order_delivered_customer_date) AS month,
    COUNT(*) AS delivered_count
  FROM olist_orders
  WHERE order_status = 'delivered'
    AND order_delivered_customer_date IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY year, month
)
SELECT 
  month AS month,
  MAX(CASE WHEN year = '2016' THEN delivered_count ELSE 0 END) AS "2016",
  MAX(CASE WHEN year = '2017' THEN delivered_count ELSE 0 END) AS "2017",
  MAX(CASE WHEN year = '2018' THEN delivered_count ELSE 0 END) AS "2018"
FROM monthly_counts
GROUP BY month
ORDER BY month ASC;
